message:
fix(lint): resolve golangci-lint errors for CI

- Handle error return from flushUnlocked in timer callback
- Remove unused entryData marshal and use short declaration
- Use empty slice instead of nil to avoid nilness warning in tests
- Check fmt.Sscanf error return in parseHexColor
- Mark attemptedActions as intentionally unused in success path
- Use defer for sql.Rows.Close() and add nosec comments for safe SQL
- Add tagsFromTitle helper to avoid dogsled with 3 blank identifiers
- Explicitly ignore error returns for non-critical cleanup operations
- Remove unused tmux import from robot_extra_test.go

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
